title: Sprint 2 Reflection: My Judgment Improved The Output
description: Use AI follow-up questions to refine your reflection on how your direction and critique improved the AI interaction.

questions.prompt: Draft your Sprint 2 reflection. Explain where you took the lead, what AI made easier, what AI made riskier, which choice you are carrying forward, and why that choice is defensible right now.
questions.placeholder: Use one specific AI interaction from this sprint. Include your first prompt, your later pushback, and the choice you are carrying forward.
questions.aiContext: This is the Sprint 2 reflection for Reframing Problems with AI. The participant is reflecting on how context, choices, confirmation, critique, and pushback changed the AI output. Ask follow-up questions that separate AI convenience from AI risk, expose the participant's judgment, and test whether the carried-forward choice is defensible with the evidence they currently have. Do not rewrite the reflection for them.
questions.discussionPrompt: Use these questions to revise your reflection. Your refined version should show how your judgment changed the output and what still needs confirmation.
questions.summaryPlaceholder: Write the final version you want to submit. Include where you led, what AI made easier and riskier, the choice you are carrying forward, and why it is defensible now.
